content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian came to the place where the celebrity race's Eternal Dao Realm was discovered, and saw this treasure land that was about to be bred, although it was just an ordinary treasure land, it was only equivalent to the ordinary area of the Eternal Realm.

However, this was originally a death zone, and there were no other treasure lands around, so there was no way to derive new treasure lands!

If there is a yin wind belt nearby, and under the influence of the yin wind belt, it has caused changes in this area and a small area of treasure land has been born, then it makes sense.

However, this place is surrounded by death zones, and it stands to reason that this is not a place where a treasure can be born.

"Many of the treasures in the Death Zone are actually special areas caused by the collision between the Demon Seed Abyss and the Eternal Realm, such as the Abyss of Despair, although it will give birth to a lot of resources, it will also make the Eternal Dao Realm demonized. But the situation here doesn't belong to any of them, it's really weird!"

Ye Tian was going to stay here and observe the situation here.

The years passed.

A Death Zone area gradually turned into a normal area, as if a small eternal kingdom had been born here.

The point is, this area is slowly spreading and expanding. 263At this rate, it won't take long for it to develop into an eternal kingdom.

This is not an eternal realm carved out by the Eternal Decree, but a region that has been born out of nature.

"Will this expansion stop, and if it doesn't stop, won't it spread to the entire Eternal Realm in the future?"

Ye Tian thought so.

If it really spreads to the entire Eternal Realm, it means one thing, that is, the Eternal Realm's death zone will disappear, and the entire Eternal Realm will recover.

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian knew that something big had happened.

If the Eternal Realm is restored, the countless forces of the Realm God Realm will be relocated!

At that time, the situation at the Eternal Frontier will also change dramatically.

In the following days, Ye Tian sent a large number of Eternal Dao Realms, half-step Eternal Realm God Realms, and even Realm God Realms to explore all over the Eternal Realm to see if a similar situation occurred.

Moreover, he also asked the Terran Realm God at the Boundary Court Headquarters to inquire about relevant information.

Soon after.

The Terrans found a similar situation in other parts of the Eternal Border.

"Ancestor, we have found a successful reversal of the Death Zone in these territories. "

A Terran half-step Eternal Realm God Realm reported.

"I see, you guys go down!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

"Yes!"

The people withdrew.

......

At this moment, Ye Tian was pondering.

He was well aware that several areas of the Death Zone were reversing and returning from the Death Zone to the normal zone.

It's not a special case, it's not just these few places, there must be other places.

Although it is still a very small territory, more and more areas will recover as time passes.

After a long time, the entire Eternal Kingdom Realm will recover, and it may not be able to catch up with the Realm God Realm for a certain period of time, but it will definitely catch up with the Realm God Realm in the future.

The roots of the Terran race were originally on the eternal border, and this was a good opportunity.

Perhaps, he can seize this opportunity to open up more eternal realms and occupy vast territories.

In the future, when those forces want to occupy territory in the Eternal Realm, the Terrans will at least be able to occupy a vast territory.

"There is no need to keep those eternal decrees, wait for those eternal realms to be taken to open up the eternal kingdom belonging to the human race. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Over the years, he had accumulated a lot of Eternal State Decrees, all of which were found in the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, and the Realm God could not enter the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain, but he could copy the Eternal Dao Realm cultivation body, and thus enter the Eternal Dao Realm True Domain.

Therefore, for a long time, he has been collecting the Eternal National Decree, and he has accumulated a large number of Eternal National Decrees in his hands, which have not been used.

After all, he was also afraid of opening up too many eternal realms and attracting the demon seed abyss too much.

But now, he must get ahead.

Wow!!!!

A pile of eternal decrees fell into his hands, and the number of these eternal decrees had reached tens of thousands.

He put these Eternal Decrees into the Terran Temple, and let those Eternal Dao Realms at the Eternal Realm be exchanged, almost at a free price for them to exchange, as long as they have cultivated the Eternal Dao Seed, they can easily exchange for an Eternal Decree.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not let these Eternal Dao Realms open up Eternal Realms here in the Endless Realms Alliance, otherwise it would not be a good thing for tens of thousands of Eternal Realms to pile up together.

He was ready to disperse these Eternal Dao realms and open up the Eternal Realm.

After all, the territory of the Eternal Kingdom is very vast and can be dispersed, so that it can occupy pieces of territory, and the influence of the human race will also radiate to the entire Eternal Kingdom.

However, the Terrans themselves have to be strong, otherwise there is no way to hold these territories.

In addition, Ye Tian also let those several areas of the death zone that were being reversed be used as the territory of the Terran to open up the eternal realm, since those areas could be reversed in the first batch, maybe they would become top treasure lands in the future, so they naturally had to occupy them as soon as possible.

As a result, many Terrans went to the Dao Realm for eternity and opened up eternal realms.

The human race now has cultivated a lot of Eternal Dao Realms of the Eternal Dao Species, so tens of thousands of Eternal Kingdom Orders have been used up in a short period of time, turning into tens of thousands of Eternal Kingdoms.

After these tens of thousands of eternal kingdoms are opened up, a large number of Terrans can migrate over, and each Terran can obtain a huge territory and a large amount of resources, and the development of the Terrans will naturally be accelerated. []

Of course, there are naturally more demon seed abyss projections.

Ye Tian didn't go to destroy those demon seed abysses one by one, let the human race deal with it by itself, and guard and deal with the demon seeds by himself.

He can't control it now, it is impossible to think about everything for the Terrans, so what do you want the Terrans to do.

So.

He wasn't worried now.

Moreover, the Terran is now strong in its own right, so naturally he doesn't need to worry too much.

this day.

The intelligence agents at the Realm Tribunal Headquarters delivered a message about the reversal of the Death Zone of the Eternal Border.

After Ye Tian finished reading it, he muttered, "Sure enough, the changes in the Eternal Realm Realm have already been discovered by the Realm Court Headquarters, and several discussions have been held. "

It's just that the Terran intelligence officer is too low-grade, and I don't know what was discussed in those discussion meetings.

However, he knew very well that those forces in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom would inevitably make moves next.
